violations.text: The 3 Bay Sink Area used for wash/rinse/sanitize of coffee equipment does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back room area, is not tight-fitting. At the time of inspection, gaps in the lower exterior door area were visible from the inside. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
